positive: A stylized, minimalist composition of a howling wolf and a full moon silhouetted against a gradient of deep indigo, violet, and electric turquoise. The wolf's posture is dynamic and aggressive, with sharp, angular lines. The moon should have subtle lunar craters rendered in stark white. The overall aesthetic must be graphic, high-contrast, and suitable for screen printing. Style: vector art meets celestial gothic. Composition: Centralized and symmetrical. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting creating sharp edges. Color: Limited palette of midnight blues, silver, and stark white. Print details: Solid color areas and clear outlines only. No gradients within the silhouette edges.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, artifact, low resolution, poorly drawn, fuzzy, muddy, complex background, realistic photo
